repos.name: ardupilot
repos.notes: Shallow clone of default branch (master) HEAD. Submodules NOT initialized — 15 submodules are pinned by SHA in .gitmodules (reproducible) but content not fetched. MAVLink XML and DroneCAN DSDL are absent from working tree.

repos.name: ardupilot_wiki
repos.notes: Shallow clone of default branch HEAD. No submodules.

reproducibility_flags.detail: ardupilot declares 15 submodules. All are pinned by exact SHA in .gitmodules (GOOD), but were not fetched in this shallow clone. Missing content: modules/mavlink (MAVLink message XML definitions), modules/DroneCAN/DSDL (DroneCAN DSDL schemas), modules/DroneCAN/libcanard, modules/ChibiOS, plus 11 others. To fetch: git -C .kb/corpus/ardupilot submodule update --init --depth 1 modules/mavlink modules/DroneCAN

settings.json denies Write(.kb/corpus/**). MANIFEST.json and inventory.json are placed at .kb/ root instead of .kb/corpus/ as originally specified. The deny rule is intentional (corpus is read-only ground truth) but blocks metadata files that canonically belong inside corpus/.
